theme: Dark Mode Only (Command Center / Tactical Minimalism)

headings.instruction: Do NOT use Inter for headings. Use IBM Plex Sans for a technical, command-center feel.

body.instruction: Use monospace for data, stats, table content, logs, and queue items to enhance the 'automation engine' aesthetic.

colors.rules: Avoid gradients. Use solid colors. Never use pure #000000 or #808080 without a tint. The accent colors exist strictly to communicate system status.

surface_strategies.cards: The 'Technical Grid' Look. Use flat backgrounds with a 1px solid border (border-zinc-800) and sharp corners (rounded-none or rounded-sm). No soft drop shadows.
surface_strategies.headers: Solid Background (bg-zinc-950) with a hard bottom border (border-b border-zinc-800). Do not use transparent backgrounds.
surface_strategies.hover_states: Slight brightness increase (e.g., hover:bg-zinc-800) and border color shift (hover:border-zinc-600). Must ensure text contrast remains high.

grids_and_layouts.bento_grid: MODE B: High Density Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Use tight gaps (gap-4). Span logic: Summary (col-span-1), Main Chart/Table (col-span-2 or 3).
grids_and_layouts.spacing: Use p-4 to p-6 for inner card padding. Container max-width should be full width (w-full px-4 md:px-8) to act as a dense admin console.
grids_and_layouts.alignment: Left-align dense content and data. Top-align grid items (align-items: start) unless stretching is explicitly needed.

visual_enhancers.textures: Use a subtle CSS grid background (linear-gradient overlay) on the main app background to simulate a technical blueprint or command center radar.
visual_enhancers.borders: Expose the skeleton. Use grid structures where items share borders (border-collapse style) to increase data density.
visual_enhancers.status_indicators: Use pulsing colored dots (w-2 h-2 rounded-full animate-pulse) next to client names or automation engines to show live status.

components.buttons: Sharp edges (rounded-none). High contrast. Primary action: bg-white text-black hover:bg-zinc-200. Secondary: border border-zinc-700 hover:bg-zinc-800.
components.tables: Dense. border-b border-zinc-800 on rows. Use monospace font for numbers/dates. No alternating row colors, keep it minimalist.
components.forms: Inputs with sharp edges, bg-zinc-900 border-zinc-800 text-white focus:border-zinc-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-zinc-500.
components.sidebar: Narrow, icon-heavy or dense text list. border-r border-zinc-800.

motion.micro_interactions: Hover states must transition smoothly (transition-colors duration-200).
motion.status: Use subtle pulsing (animate-pulse) on active/running indicators to signify background automation.
motion.lists: Staggered entrance animations for log entries or queue items.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1. Never use gray text on dark gray backgrounds if it fails WCAG AA.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have visible focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-zinc-500 focus:outline-none).

media_and_icons.icon_library: @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone or Regular) or lucide-react. Prefer sharp, technical icons.
media_and_icons.image_usage: Use avatars for multi-client representation. Ensure images don't exceed 80vh on mobile.

3d_and_charts.charts: Use Recharts or Shadcn Charts with monochromatic or stark highly contrasting accents (e.g., solid white lines on dark backgrounds, or sharp neon green for upward trends). No soft gradient fills.
3d_and_charts.3d_libraries: Not recommended for this dense command center unless plotting global reach. Stick to Recharts for performance.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly create .js files (JSX syntax inside .js is fine if configured, or use plain React standards), do not use .tsx files.
Use standard Tailwind classes. Include @phosphor-icons/react or lucide-react for icons.
Do not use text-align: center on the main app container.
Never use generic centered layouts or simplistic gradients. Maintain the brutalist, data-dense command center look.
Build Shadcn-style components locally with raw HTML/Tailwind to maintain the 'rounded-none / 1px border' aesthetic. Do not use default Vercel-look cards.
All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g. data-testid='client-add-button').
Add transition-colors and explicit hover/focus states to all buttons and links.
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and 1px borders.
Use glass-morphism effects carefully with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) only for sticky headers, with explicit 1px borders.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (transition: all). Always add transitions for specific properties.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern, sharp button styles with interaction animations & context-relevant colors.
NEVER use Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions. Static = dead.
Use generous spacing but maintain high density for data grids (Mode B).
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Components MUST use named exports. Pages MUST use default exports.
